response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 19 years of experience and solid cloud/infrastructure expertise, but lacks the strategic AI focus required for this director-level role. AI experience is very recent (< 3 months in current position) and appears development-tool focused rather than strategic platform work. No Master's/PhD in AI, no demonstrated AI-powered products with market impact, and limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership or customer advisory responsibilities.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 19 years across multiple technical domains demonstrating broad depth; MIT CS degree and hands-on expertise with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
Founder of GISCollective open-source platform (ongoing since 2016) shows entrepreneurial initiative; strong mentoring track record through workshops, dojos, and formal training
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing recent commitment to the AI space and hands-on builder mentality
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent (started April 2025, ~2 months) with no prior demonstrated machine learning, data science, or AI platform experience to establish recognized expertise
Missing preferred qualification of Master's/PhD in AI; GISCollective is open-source hobby project focused on geo-data, not an AI-powered product demonstrating market impact or innovation
Limited evidence of director-level strategic visioning, customer advisory work, or leadership of disruptive initiatives; background emphasizes hands-on execution over strategic influence

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI expertise and recognized products
Technical foundation and years of experience
